# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export default async function (request: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (request.method !== 'POST') {
    return new Response('Method Not Allowed', { status: 405 });
  }

  try {
    const { content, headers: userHeaders } = await request.json() as {
      content: string;
      headers?: Record<string, string>;
    };

    if (typeof content !== 'string') {
      return new Response('Bad Request: "content" must be a string.', { status: 400 });
    }

    const textEncoder = new TextEncoder();

    const readableStream = new ReadableStream({
      start(controller) {
        // Enqueue the user-provided content directly
        controller.enqueue(textEncoder.encode(content));
        // Close the stream as all content has been provided
        controller.close();
      },
    });

    const responseHeaders = new Headers();
    responseHeaders.set('Content-Type', 'text/plain; charset=utf-8'); // Default content type

    // Apply user-provided headers, allowing them to override defaults
    if (userHeaders) {
      for (const key in userHeaders) {
        if (Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(userHeaders, key)) {
          responseHeaders.set(key, userHeaders[key]);
        }
      }
    }

    return new Response(readableStream, {
      headers: responseHeaders,
    });

  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Error processing request:', error);
    return new Response(`Internal Server Error: ${(error as Error).message}`, { status: 500 });
  }
}
